sections_cited: Section 21 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-5332 of 2024 M/s.Al-Amina Enterprises.......v/s.......Federation of Pakistan & others _______________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature of Judge _______________________________________________________________ 1.For order on office objection. 2.For hearing of Misc.No.23595/2024 3.For hearing of main case. 18-12-2024. Mr.Aftab Hussain Kalhoro, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, D.A.G. Mr.Syed Ahsan Ali Shah, Advocate for Respondent No.3 (F.B.R). --- It is jointly proposed that this petition be disposed of in terms that the petitioner shall avail remedy pursuant to Section 21 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990 within a period of one week from the date of this order. The Department shall adjudicate the representation after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and shall pass a speaking order. Pending such adjudication, no further coercive action shall be taken by the Department against the petitioner. This petition along with listed application is disposed of accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
